name: Research Notes
tagline: Writes a Markdown research note for each topic on a schedule. Notes are saved locally to read, edit, and keep.
description:
A producer worker that searches Google Custom Search for your configured research topics, fetches article content, and uses an LLM to synthesize a durable Markdown research note saved to your local filesystem.

Configurable topics, result count, date restriction, and synthesis prompt. Notes are indexed in worker KV for easy browsing.

This is a built-in BFrost plugin worker. If you have deleted it, you can restore it here.
author: @bfrost

versions.changelog: Initial installable package for the Research Notes built-in worker.
